status: Oracle Upper Bound established. Architecture validated. LoRA text generation fix pending.
motivation: V4-Slim proved the Information Bottleneck (2.6M params) eliminates Directional Drift (mIoU=0.7316 on RWTD, stable). V5 adds [SEG] token grounding + block-diagonal attention mask + Qwen LoRA (r=8) to decouple visual representations from language context and enable end-to-end learned grounding.

architecture.qwen: Qwen3-VL-8B + LoRA (r=8, q_proj + v_proj). Trained via [SEG]-only loss masking.
architecture.seg_token: <|seg|> appended after each TEXTURE description. Dedicated grounding anchor.
architecture.block_diagonal_mask: 4D attention mask prevents cross-texture Context Leakage. TEXTURE_i tokens cannot attend to TEXTURE_j (j<i). All blocks see the shared prefix (system + image + user). Pre-computed position_ids from 2D mask passed to avoid get_rope_index crash on 4D input.
architecture.projector: Bottleneck 4096 → 512 → 256 with LayerNorm + GELU + Dropout(0.15). ~2.1M params.
architecture.sam3: Batch Multiplexed (each query in own slot-1). Orthogonal LoRA r=32 on q,k,v,out_proj.
architecture.losses: Mask (CE + 3.0*Dice) + LM (0.1 weight, only on [SEG] positions) + Orth Reg (0.01). No distillation.
architecture.curriculum: 3-stage: (1) Projector warmup ep1-2, (2) + Qwen LoRA ep3-5, (3) + SAM LoRA ep6+

stage_transitions.stage_4_geometric_only: ep8-10 (val: 0.74→0.75→0.75, Qwen LoRA frozen, projector+SAM only)

oracle_peak.note: Geometric ceiling. Continued training caused mild regression to 0.797 by ep10.

oracle_evaluation.description: Bypasses Qwen generation. Feeds GT descriptions through training forward() path (block-diagonal mask, [SEG] extraction, bottleneck projector, SAM). Establishes the architectural upper bound.

ep10_automatic.note: Slight regression from ep7 — projector+SAM LoRA mild overfit to ADE20K

oracle_evaluation.oracle_trajectory: ep7=0.810 → ep10=0.797. Geometric ceiling reached at ep7. Continued training (Stage 4, Qwen frozen) caused mild ADE20K overfit, reducing RWTD by -0.013.
oracle_evaluation.optimal_projector_warmup: 5-7 epochs. Val reaches 0.70+ by ep5, Oracle peaks at ep7. Beyond that, diminishing returns.

live_inference_failure.description: V5 live inference on RWTD yields mIoU=0.1364. Qwen's LoRA collapsed — generates garbage (Chinese chars, emojis, no <|seg|> tokens).
live_inference_failure.root_cause: Loss masking (-100 on ALL text tokens) + high qwen_lr_scale (0.2) caused catastrophic forgetting. LoRA optimized purely for spatial gradients from SAM without ANY linguistic regularization.

sample_outputs: sandy ocean floor... ENCED ENCED EN
weathered gray wood... 合作共赢

live_inference_failure.fix_planned: Reduce qwen_lr_scale (0.2 → 0.05), add LM regularization weight on text tokens (partial unmasking), potentially use separate LR warmup for LoRA

key_findings.finding: V5 Oracle achieves 0.8098 mIoU on RWTD — new SOTA for trained models
key_findings.evidence: GT descriptions → block-diagonal mask → [SEG] extraction → bottleneck projector → SAM produces 0.81 mIoU, beating all prior results by 10%+
key_findings.impact: Architecture is validated. The bottleneck projector + block-diagonal mask + SAM LoRA generalizes to unseen data when text conditioning is correct.

key_findings.evidence: Visual bias ablation proved inter-texture cosine drops from 0.74 (causal) to 0.16 (masked). The mask is the key architectural innovation.
key_findings.impact: Each [SEG] hidden state encodes ONLY its own texture + the image, not contamination from other texture descriptions.

key_findings.finding: LoRA catastrophic forgetting from aggressive loss masking
key_findings.evidence: LM loss on text = 0 (all masked to -100). LoRA receives gradient ONLY from SAM spatial signal. After 5 epochs, Qwen can no longer generate coherent text.
key_findings.impact: Training dynamics must be fixed: lower LR, partial text loss retention, or frozen LoRA text generation layers.

key_findings.finding: Val mIoU tracks architecture health accurately
key_findings.evidence: Val (teacher-forced) climbed 0.45→0.73 over 7 epochs, consistent with Oracle test mIoU of 0.81. Val is a reliable proxy for Oracle performance.
key_findings.impact: Can use val mIoU to monitor architecture during training without expensive Oracle eval.
